name: memecoin-monitor
description: Multi-chain memecoin monitoring dashboard powered by gmgn.ai data

scripts.deploy: wrangler pages deploy public --project-name tradermeme --branch main
scripts.build: echo 'Static site, no build step needed'
scripts.test: node tests/signal-engine.test.mjs && node tests/tracking-storage.test.mjs && node tests/monitor-enrichment.test.mjs && node tests/archive-copy-static.test.mjs && node tests/visual-polish-static.test.mjs
